text: controlled loose stool and fluid loss due to chemo; nausea control; control of mouth thrush, sores. The Bentil in particular worked much better than immodium for diarhea control and fluid retention. It also stopped colon muscle spasm. dizziness, fatigue, loss of appetite benil taken 2x a day to control diarhea; flucanzole 1x a day for thrush; rest of medications for nausea
